programs.title: Mountain Men
programs.desc: Lauro confronts minus 40 weather, a broken sled, and exhausted dogs on the Iditarod Trail while running down the frozen Yukon River. Bret and Ivy make an impressive haul of beaver to finish their season.

programs.title: Secrets Declassified With David Duchovny
programs.desc: Forget the moon or the stars-every government has even bigger designs in the race to dominate the sky. Uncover a plane crash in North Carolina that almost triggered nuclear Armageddon.

programs.title: The Death Coast
programs.desc: Jeff MacKinnon's team searches Scatarie Island for the Feversham's lost fortune. Battling brutal currents, they uncover artefacts that may lead to treasure.

programs.title: Swamp People
programs.desc: Ronnie moves his lines into the cypress swamps but soon finds himself going toe-to-toe with the King of the Swamp. Ashley gambles on a journey deep into unfamiliar territory behind a locked gate.

programs.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programs.desc: From priceless treasure found inside a lost city to an ancient manuscript hidden behind a wall, we explore secrets lost deep inside various unseen chambers, like tunnels, caves, or even burial sites.

programs.title: Alone
programs.desc: As the season begins to change, one participant is forced to take on a massive project. Meanwhile, a pack of wolves interrupts the tranquility of the Arctic night and spells trouble for one survivalist.
